overview.description: The FT Vest Nasdaq-100 Buffer ETF - September (QSPT) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in downside hedge alternatives. The fund aims for specific buffered losses and capped gains on QQQ ETF over a specific holding period. The actively-managed fund holds options and collateral. QSPT was launched on Sep 17, 2021 and is issued by First Trust.
